deferrals.summary: comment-fallback marker is run-scoped but not attempt-scoped; a stalled re-run attempt could surface the prior attempt's verdict
deferrals.explanation: deliberate design documented at the match site ('selects only this run's comment(s) across attempts'); last-wins across attempts is pinned by the two-attempts test; attempt-scoping would break resume-across-attempt

deferrals.summary: line-start verdict marker anywhere in a COMMENTED body classifies it verdict-bearing (human quote at column 0)
deferrals.explanation: the (?:^|\n) line-start semantics deliberately match the downstream grep -E per-line extraction; anchoring classification tighter than extraction would reintroduce the masking asymmetry

deferrals.summary: system-overview finalize_check bullet lags the new positive-APPROVE-on-HEAD fail-closed semantics
deferrals.explanation: file untouched by this PR's diff (pre-existing text); docs alignment belongs to the /devflow:docs pass — widens-surface guard clean (no diff hunk overlaps docs/DEVFLOW_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md)
